chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition No.D-170 of 2023. _________________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE _________________________________________________________________ 01. For orders on M.A.No.711/2023. 02. For orders on office objection “A”. 03. For orders on M.A.No.643/2023. 04. For orders on M.A.No.644/2023. 05. For hearing of main case. 21.03.2023 Petitioner Sabir Ali in person. = * = * = * = * = * = It is stated by the petitioner that he initially was appointed by the respondents as Supervisor, on daily wages basis; subsequently, his services were hired by them on contract basis as helper through 3rd party; finally those were confirmed after having recourse through this Court. By stating so, he sought for regularization of his services from the date of his initial appointment with all back benefits including promotion etc. The services which the petitioner have rendered with the respondents on daily wages basis and/or contract basis through 3rd party could hardly be counted towards seniority making him entitled to back benefits including promotion; consequently, the instant constitutional petition being misconceived is dismissed in limine together with pending applications. JUDGE JUDGE
